_readme.description: Qualitative player notes for LDB 2026 auction. Merged into ldb_data.js at build time.

fields.tags: Array of tag strings. Built-in recognized tags: INJURED, IL, DTD, SLEEPER, BREAKOUT, BUST, CLOSER_RISK, ROLE_UNCLEAR, HANDCUFF, PLATOON, PROSPECT, AGING, BOUNCE_BACK, STREAKY, DEEP_LEAGUE, ADP_VALUE, ADP_AVOID, ROFR_TARGET, LDB_NEED
fields.note: Free-text scouting note shown in player card tooltip / intel section
fields.health_pct: 0-100 estimated availability. 100 = full season, 70 = ~112 games / 115 IP expected
fields.role: Short role description, e.g. 'Locked closer', 'Setup only', 'Platoon DH', 'TBD'

_readme.auto_tags_from_stats: generate_data.py also auto-applies stat-based tags. Manual tags here take precedence / stack on top.
_readme.name_matching: Use exact projection file names (e.g. 'Shohei Ohtani'). Fuzzy matching is applied as fallback.

players.name: Tarik Skubal
players.note: Reigning AL Cy Young. Elite stuff, durable. Only risk is modest regression from historic 2024 ratios.

players.name: Chris Sale
players.note: Won NL Cy Young at 35. History of TJ surgery and rib injuries. Monitor spring training workload.

players.name: Edwin Díaz
players.note: Recovering from 2023 WBC knee injury; returned strong in 2024 but durability always a concern. Mets closer.

players.name: Hunter Greene
players.note: FRY holds ROFR. Elite stuff+, top-5 SP upside. Must-protect or must-bid — do not let CORN grab cheap.

players.name: José Alvarado
players.note: FRY ROFR. Elite stuff but walk rate and blown save history create real VIJAY variance.

players.name: Tanner Scott
players.note: FRY ROFR. Dodgers closer situation. Good K rate, reliable holds even if not locking saves.

players.name: Tyler O'Neill
players.note: FRY ROFR. Power/speed upside but injury history and contact issues cap floor.

players.name: Corbin Carroll
players.note: FRY keeper (H3). Down year in 2024 but elite speed and OBP foundation. Bounce-back candidate.

players.name: Ronald Acuña Jr.
players.note: FRY keeper (K2). Full ACL recovery expected. If healthy, top-3 overall player — OPS+OBP+aSB monster.

players.name: Shohei Ohtani
players.note: Batting only in 2026 (TJ recovery). No pitching value — pure elite bat. No SP/RP contribution.

players.name: Paul Skenes
players.note: Best stuff in baseball. Only question is whether Pirates stretch him to 180+ IP in year 2.

players.name: Dylan Cease
players.note: High-K but HR/9 and walk rate make ratios volatile. Petco helps but not a set-it-forget-it arm.

players.name: Framber Valdez
players.note: Elite groundball rate suppresses HRA — ideal for LDB. Durable workhorse. MGS consistently strong.

players.name: Jhoan Duran
players.note: Best non-closer RP in baseball. Splitter is a weapon. High-leverage lockdown, holds accumulator.

players.name: Andrés Muñoz
players.note: Mariners closer, elite K rate. Low BS history. One of the cleanest VIJAY profiles available.

players.name: Blake Snell
players.note: Still unsigned as of March 2026. Stuff declined in 2024 with Giants. Risk of poor team or bullpen role.

players.name: Gerrit Cole
players.note: TJ surgery in 2024. Full return timeline uncertain — may not pitch until mid-2026 at earliest.

players.name: Spencer Strider
players.note: TJ surgery, missed 2024. If velocity returns, top-5 SP upside. High reward, non-trivial risk.

players.name: Yoshinobu Yamamoto
players.note: TJ surgery mid-2024. Unlikely to contribute full season 2026. Monitor return date closely.
